arts.ttl: West Ham launch €67m bid for Barcelona forward target
arts.sum: Barcelona have been scouring European football for their next answer at the number nine position, in acknowledgement that Robert Lewandowski will be 37 next August, even if his contract is set to continue for next season. One of the names they have identified as a potential successor is subject of a major transfer bid in […] The post West Ham launch €67m bid for Barcelona forward target appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s draw with Getafe followed by death threats
arts.sum: Online trolls target Getafe coach Bordalás after Barça game Barcelona’s draw against Getafe on Saturday generated a huge number of talking points, with Barça president Joan Laporta labelling the performance of the match officials a “disgrace” and a “scandal,” while coach Hansi Flick claimed he had “never experienced anything like” the “emotion in the stadium, in all the actions, in the contacts”.

arts.ttl: ‘A disgrace’ – Barcelona president Laporta fumes over refereeing decisions vs Getafe
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta on Monday made use of the opportunity to make clear his frustration with the level of officiating in the club’s most recent outing. Barcelona, of course,…

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid learn fates as Copa del Rey quarter-final draw confirmed
arts.sum: The remaining clubs vying it out for glory in this season’s Copa del Rey have on Tuesday discovered their respective opponents in the competition’s quarter-finals. Hansi Flick’s Barcelona, fresh off…

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Benfica - Champions League
arts.sum: Predicting how Barcelona could line up for their Champions League clash against Benfica.

arts.ttl: Official: One in, one out as Barcelona name squad to face Benfica
arts.sum: The squad of players set to be depended upon by La Liga giants Barcelona to get the better of Benfica tomorrow night has on Monday been unveiled. And it features…

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid learn Copa del Rey quarter-final opponents
arts.sum: Full list of fixtures in the 2024/25 Copa del Rey quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Barcelona draw Valencia in Copa del Rey quarter-finals
arts.sum: Barcelona have been drawn to face Valencia in the quarter-finals of this season’s Copa del Rey. Valencia CF will be our opponent in the Copa del Rey quarter-finals!

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 6-4 Barcelona: the dream scenario for Clásico rivals after Copa draw
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barcelona are about to learn their fate in the draw for the quarterfinals of the Copa del Rey, a key competition in both teams’ push to win multiple trophies in 2024/25. Additionally, Madrid will take part in the new-and-improved FIFA Club World Cup in the summer of 2025, which takes the total number of competitions they could win this season (and postseason) to six.

arts.ttl: 'A scandal!' - Laporta rips refereeing after Barca denied penalty at Getafe
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta has blasted the refereeing during Saturday's 1-1 draw with Getafe in La Liga . The decision angered many fans, particularly as Real Madrid had been given a penalty at Getafe for a similar incident.
